zh.Toledo, Castilla la Mancha, España: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh.Villafranca del Bierzo, León, Castilla y: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安維利亞福朗卡 德爾 比爾左
zh.lifeSummary: 當Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo於1020年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Conde Nuño Rodríguez de Cangas, Count of Berzio11歲，母親D. Ximena Ordoñez de León10歲。他去世於1050年在葡萄牙享年30歲，埋葬在葡萄牙波爾圖白奧。

nameMeanings.name: Muñoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Miguel, Francisco, Mario, Ruben, Pedro, Jorge.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Catarina, Paulo, Anatolio.
Spanish (Muñoz): patronymic from the old personal name Muño. Compare Nunoz .

variants.name: Nunoz
meanings: Hispanic (Nuñoz): altered form of Spanish Muñoz (see Munoz ).

variants.name: Munos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jaime, Pablo, Rafael, Raul, Adolfo, Alfonso, Balentin, Beatriz, Carlos.
Spanish (Muños): variant of Muñoz (see Munoz ). This surname is most common in Colombia.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Munio
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: King Sancho III of Navarre, Aragon and Castile dies and his lands become separate Kingdoms.

en.lifeSummary: When Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo was born in 1020, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Conde Nuño Rodríguez de Cangas, Count of Berzio, was 11 and his mother, D. Ximena Ordoñez de León, was 10. He died in 1050, in Portugal, at the age of 30, and was buried in Baião, Porto, Portugal.

fr.Villafranca del Bierzo, León, Castilla y: Villafranca del Bierzo, León, Castilla y León, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo est né en 1020, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Conde Nuño Rodríguez de Cangas, Count of Berzio, avait 11 ans et sa mère, D. Ximena Ordoñez de León, avait 10 ans. Il est décédé en 1050, à Portugal, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Baião, Porto, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo 1020 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conde Nuño Rodríguez de Cangas, Count of Berzio 11 und seine Mutter D. Ximena Ordoñez de León 10. Er starb 1050 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Portugal und wurde in Baião, Porto, Portugal begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo(이)가 1020년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conde Nuño Rodríguez de Cangas, Count of Berzio(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 D. Ximena Ordoñez de León(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1050년 포르투갈에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 포토 베이a오에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Munio Muñoz de Bierzo Conde de Bierzo родился в 1020 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Conde Nuño Rodríguez de Cangas, Count of Berzio было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали D. Ximena Ordoñez de León, 10. Он умер в 1050 г. в местности Португалия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности беиaо, порто, Португалия.
